details: Trimmed leading/trailing whitespace from text columns.
reason: Whitespace can break joins, filters, grouping, and categorical consistency.
Codes should be case-consistent before validation and modeling.

details: Converted confirmed date/datetime columns to pandas datetime.
reason: Only true timestamps were parsed. HHMM operational time fields and timezone were left untouched.

details: Kept operational HHMM-style time fields and timezone as strings instead of parsing them as datetimes.
reason: These are identifiers/clock fields, not full timestamps.

columns: departure_delay_minutes, tmpf, dwpf, sknt, gust, relh, vsby, p01i, alti, flight_number, scheduled_elapsed_time_minutes, actual_elapsed_time_minutes, taxiout_time_minutes, delay_carrier_minutes, delay_weather_minutes, delay_national_aviation_system_minutes, delay_security_minutes, delay_late_aircraft_arrival_minutes, year_x, lon, lat, elevation, year_y, latitude, longitude, elevation_ft, num_runways
details: Converted likely numeric columns to numeric dtype using coercion.
reason: Numeric consistency is required for anomaly checks, summaries, and modeling.
Exact duplicates add no information and can bias analysis.

columns: date_dt, carrier_code, flight_number, origin_airport, destination_airport, scheduled_departure_dt
details: Checked business-key duplicates only; no rows dropped because DROP_FLIGHT_KEY_DUPLICATES=False.
reason: Business-key duplicate removal should be explicit, not accidental.

details: Removed the known BTS source/junk row and carrier codes outside the 5 project carriers.
reason: Keeps the dataset aligned with the documented project scope.
Dew point above air temperature indicates a bad sensor reading.
Wind gust lower than sustained wind indicates a bad sensor reading.

details: Set `relh` to missing where values were outside [0, 100].
reason: Clearly impossible physical values should not be retained as valid measurements.

details: Set `sknt` to missing where values were negative.
reason: Clearly impossible physical values should not be retained as valid measurements.

details: Set `gust` to missing where values were negative.
reason: Clearly impossible physical values should not be retained as valid measurements.

details: Set `vsby` to missing where values were negative.
reason: Clearly impossible physical values should not be retained as valid measurements.

details: Set `p01i` to missing where values were negative.
reason: Clearly impossible physical values should not be retained as valid measurements.

details: Created the binary target from `departure_delay_minutes` using threshold >= 15 minutes.
reason: This is the project target used for classification.

columns: gust, wxcodes, skyc2, skyc3, skyc4, skyl2, skyl3, skyl4
details: Preserved natural sparsity in sparse weather fields; no blanket imputation was performed here.
reason: These columns are sparse by nature, so missingness is meaningful.

details: Split cleaned dataset into train (2022-2023), validation (2024), and test (2025).
reason: Prevents temporal leakage and reflects real-world forecasting conditions.
